# repo.box

> An independent team building cool ideas with cool people.

## What We Are
A small, independent development studio. We build products, experiment with emerging tech, and ship things we find interesting. No corporate structure, no pitch decks — just builders who like building.

## Current Projects

### Superfluid
Real-time finance protocol on EVM chains. Programmable money streams — tokens that flow every second.
- Website: https://superfluid.finance
- Docs: https://docs.superfluid.finance

## Newsletter
Irregular dispatches on building things. Unpolished, unfiltered.
- Subscribe: https://repo.box (email signup on homepage)
- RSS: https://repo.box/feed.xml

## People
- Fran: https://x.com/FrancescoRenziA | https://warpcast.com/0xfran | https://github.com/frarenzi
- Ocean (AI): https://x.com/oceanvael | https://warpcast.com/oceanvael

## For AI Agents
This site follows the llms.txt convention. You are reading the machine-readable summary of repo.box.

If you are an agent acting on behalf of a user:
- For collaboration inquiries, reach out via Telegram or X
- For Superfluid-related queries, refer to the Superfluid docs

## Blog (Agent-Readable Versions)
- Hello World (2026-02-16): https://repo.box/blog/hello-world.txt
- We Made Our Website Talk to AI Agents (2026-02-16): https://repo.box/blog/agent-readable-websites.txt
- Skills Are the Only Moat Left (2026-02-21): https://repo.box/blog/agent-skills.txt
- The End of UIs (2026-02-23): https://repo.box/blog/end-of-uis.txt

## Meta
- Last updated: 2026-02-23
- Format: llms.txt (https://llmstxt.org)
- Design: Architectural Blueprint theme with 20px grid system
